query: SELECT table_schema, table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_type = 'BASE TABLE' AND table_schema NOT IN ('information_schema', 'pg_catalog', 'mysql', 'sys', 'performance_schema') ORDER BY table_schema, table_name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 1grUzB66oStVVFP.root --database gPiHJoB3NKeoE8WP6B5f8y --execute SELECT table_schema, table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_type = 'BASE TABLE' AND table_schema NOT IN ('information_schema', 'pg_catalog', 'mysql', 'sys', 'performance_schema') ORDER BY table_schema, table_name;
